nodes.label: P2.2 synth — dead units and goodness separation across negative types
nodes.rationale: random/oracle/hard-unsup dead-unit fractions climb toward 0.3-0.5 by layer 8 while hard-proto stays at 0; goodness separation for all types rises through mid-depth (peaking ~0.4-0.55 around layers 3-5) before easing, mirroring the P2.0 synth control's mid-depth peak shape.
